ground_truth.title: Basketball Shoe Reviews - 369 Shoes starting from $41.23
ground_truth.main_content:
Basketball Shoe Reviews
369 Shoes available
Sorted By: Release date

Adidas AE 2
released Oct. 2025
from $130.00
Buy from 3 Shops
rating based on 8 expert reviews: 8.6
The Adidas AE 2 offers the same performance as the AE 1 at a lighter weight.
This shoe is best for quick and shifty players.

Under Armour Curry Fox 2
released Sep. 2025
from $120.00
Buy from Under Armour
rating based on 3 expert reviews: 7.7
The Curry Fox 2 offers excellent traction and a familiar feeling to the Curry Fox 1.
This shoe is best for fans of the original Curry Fox 1.

Puma MB.05
released Sep. 2025
from $114.99 (List: $130)
Buy from 2 Shops
rating based on 3 expert reviews: 8.2
The Puma MB.05 could be LaMelo's best signature shoe thanks to the improved cushioning.
The shoe is best for fans of previous models who might want more cushioning.

Puma Hali 1
released Sep. 2025
from $130.00
Buy from 2 Shops
rating based on 6 expert reviews: 8.4
The Puma Hali 1 might be one of the brand's best performance shoes. The traction, in particular, is fantastic.
This shoe is best for Puma basketball fans looking for something different.

Nike Ja 3
released Aug. 2025
rating based on 10 expert reviews: 8.2
The Nike Ja 3 plays fast, smooth, and low to the ground. The reliable traction is its best feature.
The Ja 3 is perfect for players who are fast, quick, and explosive.

Adidas D.O.N. Issue 7
released Aug. 2025
from $95.97 (List: $120)
Buy from 4 Shops
rating based on 8 expert reviews: 8.7
The Adidas D.O.N. Issue 7 is a step up in performance thanks to its excellent cushioning and improved cushioning.
This shoe is suitable for all positions and play styles. It has something for everyone.

Nike Giannis Freak 7
released Aug. 2025
from $75.97 (List: $115)
Buy from 2 Shops
rating based on 7 expert reviews: 7.8
The Nike Giannis Freak 7 is a decent performance shoe at a lower price point. The traction is the highlight feature.
The Freak 7 is best for players who want reliable traction without excess springy cushioning.

Under Armour Curry Series 7
released Aug. 2025
from $160.00
Buy from Under Armour
rating based on 5 expert reviews: 8.5
The Curry Series 7 might be the best Curry shoe to date.
The Series 7 is best for fans of the Flow traction who also want more cushioning.

Nike Kobe Protro 3
released Aug. 2025
from $169.99 (List: $210)
Buy from Foot Locker
rating based on 4 expert reviews: 8.2
The Nike Kobe 3 Protro offers decent traction with upgraded cushioning.
This shoe is a great pick for players seeking a modern high-top basketball shoe.

Air Jordan 40
released Jul. 2025
from $205.00
Buy from 2 Shops
rating based on 7 expert reviews: 9.0
The Jordan 40 is one of the best mainline performers released in a while, thanks to its cushioning and materials.
The Air Jordan 40 is best for players who enjoy maximum bounce and impact protection.

Nike Sabrina 3
released Jul. 2025
from $94.97 (List: $135)
Buy from 4 Shops
rating based on 5 expert reviews: 8.4
The Nike Sabrina 3 makes minor upgrades to the traction and cushioning.
This shoe is best for players who prefer minimal setups.

Converse Shai 001
released Jul. 2025
rating based on 8 expert reviews: 8.3
The Converse Shai 001 combines excellent traction and support with minimal cushioning for a strong debut shoe.
The Shai 001 is best for players who play fast and prefer minimal setups.

Puma All Pro Nitro 2
released Jul. 2025
rating based on 4 expert reviews: 8.3
The Puma All-Pro Nitro 2 is a solid, balanced performance shoe with excellent traction.
This shoe is best for players who want impact protection while still feeling quick and responsive.

Adidas Dame X
released Jun. 2025
from $71.99 (List: $90)
Buy from 4 Shops
rating based on 6 expert reviews: 8.0
The Adidas Dame X delivers reliable traction and cushioning at a budget-friendly price.
This shoe is best for price-conscious players looking for a well-rounded performer.

New Balance Fresh Foam BB V3
released Jun. 2025
from $103.99 (List: $130)
Buy from DICK's
rating based on 5 expert reviews: 8.8
The New Balance Fresh Foam BB V3 is an excellent performer with maximum cushioning.
This shoe is for players who want maximum cushioning and protection.

Li-Ning Wade DLo 1
released Jun. 2025
from $119.00 (List: $120)
Buy from Way of Wade
with: The Adidas AE 2 offers the same performance as the AE 1 at a lighter weight.
The Nike Ja 3 plays fast, smooth, and low to the ground. The reliable traction is its best feature.
The Jordan 40 is one of the best mainline performers released in a while, thanks to its cushioning and materials.
The Adidas Dame X delivers reliable traction and cushioning at a budget-friendly price.
